name: Lemon Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine lemon juice, sugar, olive oil, bay leaf, salt, dried basil, poultry seasoning, and black pepper.
2. Place over low heat and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 to 3 minutes until the mixture is cooled to room temperature.
3. Arrange chicken in a single layer in a 13 by 9 inch baking dish.
4. Pour lemon-juice mixture over chicken.
5. Let stand at room temperature for 2 to 3 hours.
6. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
7. Place skin-side of chicken on the grill and cook for 7 minutes or until browned.
8. Brush with marinade, turn skin-side up, and continue grilling white meat for an additional 10 minutes or dark meat for 15 to 20 minutes longer, turning frequently and basting with marinade.
9. Makes 4 servings.
